summary: The diff correctly updates the hardcoded passphrase in backend/main.mo to 'Nobita' via the `correctCode` constant and the `isCodeCorrect` function, and adds a migration module to migrate existing state. REQ-10 appears to be fully implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle state migration for the passphrase value change.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to update the hardcoded passphrase value in backend/main.mo. No migration module or state migration mechanism was requested.
